description: The marketing team needs to track how many users click the main 'Get Started' button on the landing page. Configure Matomo Tag Manager to track these interactions by creating a trigger named 'Trigger - Hero CTA' that fires when an element with ID 'hero-cta-primary' is clicked. Link this trigger to a Matomo Analytics Event tag with Category 'Engagement', Action 'Hero Click', and Name 'Get Started'. Publish the configuration to the 'Live' environment by creating a new container version.
